titleEn: Cowherd expansion will happen; but until that happens, don’t blame the business, blame the weather
titleZh: 牛群扩张终将到来，但在此之前，别怪市场，怪天气
summaryZh: 数据表明，天气而非市场失灵才是影响牛群扩张决策的关键因素。生产者将放牧担忧和干旱列为主要障碍，揭示了气候对畜牧业的决定性影响，值得关注行业应对策略。
contentHtml: Data shows weather, not broken markets, drives cowherd decisions. Producers cite grazing concerns and drought as top barriers to expansion.
